message.content:
Thoroughly explore the SMC TRADING SAAS project at C:\Users\User\Downloads\SMC TRADING SAAS. I need:

1. The complete file tree (all files and directories)
2. The package.json contents (dependencies, scripts)
3. The tsconfig.json contents
4. The src/index.ts exports
5. The src/core/types.ts - all interfaces and types defined
6. The src/core/constants.ts - instrument configs
7. The src/engine/RealtimeEngine.ts - full architecture
8. The src/persistence/TradeJournal.ts - full architecture
9. The src/engine/SMCAnalyzer.ts - the analyze() method signature and what it returns

Be very thorough - I need to understand everything about this project to plan a SaaS wrapper around it.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore the SMC TRADING SAAS project for you. Let me start by examining the file structure and then dive into the key files.

input.command: cd "C:\Users\User\Downloads\SMC TRADING SAAS" && find . -type f -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.md" | head -100

content.text: Let me get a better overview of the project structure:

input.command: cd "C:\Users\User\Downloads\SMC TRADING SAAS" && tree -L 3 -I "node_modules|dist" 2>/dev/null || find . -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -type d | head -50
